case_title: COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY VS. MICHELLE HOUSTON

docket_entries.description: PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON 8/31/02, IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HOUSTON, MICHELLE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOUSTON, MICHELLE $1,165.27 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,165.27, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY SERVED JUN-27-2002, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT HOUSTON, MICHELLE
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $277.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HOUSTON, MICHELLE
CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HOUSTON, MICHELLE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,450.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $412.72 INTEREST, $136.00 COSTS, MATURITY DATE OF 9/6/07 FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY
ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY THE DEFAULT SECTION.
